description: The per-supplier payables view: the running amount owed, the supplier's payment terms, and a chronological transaction history of invoices, payments, credit/debit notes, advances, and retentions. Read-only to procurement (name, amount, payment terms, transaction history) and drawn from existing transactional data, it is the aging/DPO pivot the payment flow posts to on every committed change. Source: AB creditor ledger.

fields.name: supplierId
fields.label: Supplier
fields.validation: supplier must exist; natural key (one ledger per supplier); read-only
fields.purpose: The natural key the ledger is keyed on so every payable, payment, and note for a supplier rolls up to one running balance and one aging view; the pivot for DPO and creditor-aging analytics.

fields.name: supplierName
fields.label: Supplier Name
fields.validation: denormalized from the supplier master; read-only
fields.purpose: The human-readable supplier label shown on the ledger so the read-only view is legible without joining to the supplier master.

fields.name: currency
fields.label: Currency
fields.validation: a configured currency master; the supplier's trading currency; balances also carry a base-currency sibling for aging
fields.purpose: The currency the supplier's balance is held in; the base-currency normalization lets cross-currency creditor aging be compared in one figure (axiom A12).

fields.name: amount
fields.label: Amount Owed
fields.validation: the running balance owed to the supplier; increased by approved payables/debit notes, decreased by payments/credit notes/advance recoupment/retention; recomputed on each posting
fields.computedFormula: SUM(payables + debit notes) - SUM(payments + credit notes + advance recouped + retention withheld)
fields.purpose: The current outstanding balance owed to the supplier; the headline figure of the creditor view and the basis of the aging buckets and DPO.

fields.name: paymentTerms
fields.label: Payment Terms
fields.validation: one of the locked PaymentTerms list; the supplier's default terms; read-only to procurement
fields.purpose: The supplier's standard terms shown on the ledger so the aging buckets and the overdue reminder lead are interpreted against the agreed net period (about 90% of local and US supplies are net 90).

fields.name: transactionHistory
fields.label: Transaction History
fields.validation: appended, timestamped, never edited or deleted; each entry {type (invoice/payment/credit-note/debit-note/advance/retention), refId, amount, date, balanceAfter}
fields.computedFormula: appended on each committed payable/payment/note posting
fields.purpose: The chronological, append-only record of every payable, payment, credit/debit note, advance, and retention for the supplier; the audit narrative behind the running balance and the source data for aging. Drawn from existing transactions, never hand-entered.

fields.name: overdueAmount
fields.label: Overdue Amount
fields.validation: = sum of past-due payables for this supplier (boundary 00:00:00 start-of-today); recomputed live
fields.computedFormula: SUM(supplier payables past due as of start-of-today)
fields.purpose: The past-due portion of the supplier balance that drives the creditor-aging buckets and the ~28-day overdue reminder; the start-of-today boundary keeps it deterministic and consistent with the payment breakdown.

fields.name: lastUpdatedAt
fields.label: Last Updated At
fields.validation: set on each posting; the freshness marker of the read-only view
fields.purpose: Timestamps the most recent posting so the read-only ledger shows how current the balance is and the audit trail orders the postings.

invariants: read-only to procurement (name, amount, payment terms, transaction history); drawn from existing transactional data, never hand-entered
transactionHistory is append-only, timestamped, never deleted
overdue boundary 00:00:00 start-of-today (consistent with the payment breakdown)
A13 audit + SSE on every posting
